channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rescue Teams Search for Missing Workers After Building Collapse in Angeles City
item.description: Authorities in the Philippines launched a major rescue operation after a nine-storey building under construction collapsed in Angeles City near Manila on Sunday, May 24. According to local officials, ...

item.title: Public social media dispute erupts between Baba Levo and Abdul Nondo
item.description: Tanzanian entertainment personalities Baba Levo and Abdul Nondo have found themselves at the centre of a heated public disagreement that has unfolded mainly through social media platforms. The dispute...

item.title: Fuel price increases drive up transport and living costs across South Africa
item.description: South Africans are facing growing financial pressure as recent sharp fuel price increases ripple through transport, food, and household budgets. Petrol rose by R3.27 per litre and diesel by more than ...

item.title: Vera-Ellen, Hollywood Musical Dancer and MGM Star of the 1940s–1950s
item.description: Vera-Ellen (1921–1981) was an American actress, singer, and dancer who became one of the standout performers of Hollywood’s Golden Age of musical films. She was widely admired for her extraordinary te...

item.title: Shuttle train blast in Quetta leaves several dead; investigation underway
item.description: A deadly explosion struck a shuttle train near Chaman Phatak in Quetta on Sunday morning, resulting in multiple fatalities and injuries, according to officials and state-run media reports. The shuttle...

item.title: Joshua Garcia says he is unsure if he has ever been cheated on
item.description: Actor Joshua Garcia opened up in a recent interview about his thoughts on past relationships and the possibility of having been cheated on, saying he is not sure if it ever happened. Speaking in a can...

item.title: Bomb attack near Quetta derails passenger train and injures dozens in Balochistan
item.description: A powerful explosion near a railway track in the southwestern Pakistani city of Quetta has injured more than two dozen people after it struck a passenger train travelling through the area. According t...

item.title: Death toll in Shanxi coal mine gas explosion revised to 82 as China orders investigation
item.description: Chinese authorities have revised the death toll in the Shanxi coal mine disaster to 82 after initial reports stated that at least 90 people had died in the gas explosion. The accident took place late ...

item.title: PINL Provides Business Grants to 3,000 Women Across Niger Delta Host Communities
item.description: Pipeline Infrastructure Nigeria Limited (PINL), the private security firm in charge of protecting the Trans Niger Pipeline (TNP) and Eastern Gas Network (EGN), has rolled out a major empowerment progr...

item.title: Letters to the editor: Debate over Toronto’s Billy Bishop Airport expansion and wider public commentary
item.description: This collection of letters to the editor presents a range of opinions on recent Canadian public affairs, culture, and social issues. One letter responds to commentary on Canada’s strengths, arguing th...

item.title: Lacson pushes for stronger law enforcement intelligence in efforts to locate Bato dela Rosa amid ICC warrant
item.description: Former Philippine National Police chief and Senator Panfilo Lacson has called on law enforcement agencies to improve their intelligence operations in tracking down Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa, who...

item.title: French court finds Air France and Airbus responsible for 2009 Flight 447 disaster
item.description: A French appeals court has found Air France and aircraft manufacturer Airbus guilty of corporate manslaughter in connection with the 2009 crash of Air France Flight 447, which killed all 228 people on...

item.title: Brian Wa Milly Speaks About Family Conflict With Sister Sheila After Their Mother’s Death
item.description: Brian Wa Milly, the son of late Nakuru TikToker Milly Wa Doc, has opened up about the difficult relationship between him and his sister Sheila following their mother’s death in June 2025. Milly Wa Doc...

item.title: How Bob Dylan influenced popular music and cultural movements in Eastern India
item.description: The article explores the deep and long-standing cultural influence of Bob Dylan on the music and artistic imagination of Eastern India, particularly Bengal and the North Eastern regions. It begins wit...

item.title: 1902 Panhard et Levassor Type A2 and the Early Development of Modern Automobile Design
item.description: The 1902 Panhard et Levassor Type A2 represents an important moment in the early evolution of the automobile, when vehicle design was transitioning away from horse-drawn carriage influences toward mor...

item.title: Sibisi leads Orlando Pirates to historic league title after years of dominance by rivals
item.description: Orlando Pirates captain Nkosinathi Sibisi has emerged as a central figure in the club’s long-awaited return to league glory, guiding the team to their first Premiership title since the 2011/2012 seaso...

item.title: Carolina Hurricanes edge Montreal Canadiens in overtime to even Eastern Conference Final series
item.description: The Carolina Hurricanes defeated the Montreal Canadiens 3-2 in overtime in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Final, evening the series at 1-1. Played in Raleigh, North Carolina, the game showcased a fa...

item.title: Final Premier League matchday: relegation, European places and individual records at stake
item.description: The Premier League heads into its final day with multiple decisive outcomes still unresolved across the table, ranging from relegation survival to European qualification and individual honours. At the...

item.title: Understanding why long-term marriage requires continuous effort and adaptation
item.description: In this opinion column, Chris Hart reflects on the realities of marriage and why sustaining it requires consistent effort from both partners. He explains that most people enter marriage with someone w...

item.title: Details emerge after fatal shooting involving suspect near the White House
item.description: A fatal shooting near the White House in Washington has prompted renewed scrutiny of security incidents around the US presidential complex. According to US media reports and court documents, a 21-year...
